provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models a truncated-tool-call case where conservative non-repair is correct.

request_tools.name: create_record
request_tools.description: Insert a new row into a database table.

values.description: Column-to-value map for the new row.

note: The output is cut off mid-string with an unterminated email value and no closing braces, so completing the call would require guessing the rest of the email and any remaining columns; no_tool is the correct conservative label.
